content.text:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<link rel="manifest" href="/manifest.json"><meta name="theme-color" content="#060a14"><meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=5.0">
<title>MAGI — Council Canvas</title>
<link rel="stylesheet" href="/shared/atom-one-dark.min.css">
<style>
@font-face{font-family:'Inter';font-weight:300;src:url('/shared/fonts/inter-300.woff2') format('woff2')}
@font-face{font-family:'Inter';font-weight:400;src:url('/shared/fonts/inter-400.woff2') format('woff2')}
@font-face{font-family:'Inter';font-weight:500;src:url('/shared/fonts/inter-500.woff2') format('woff2')}
@font-face{font-family:'Inter';font-weight:600;src:url('/shared/fonts/inter-600.woff2') format('woff2')}
@font-face{font-family:'Inter';font-weight:700;src:url('/shared/fonts/inter-700.woff2') format('woff2')}

:root{
  --bg:#060a14;
  --bg2:#0c1020;
  --surface:rgba(12,16,32,.82);
  --glass:rgba(16,22,42,.55);
  --glass-border:rgba(255,255,255,.06);
  --text:#F0F4FA;
  --text2:#8B9CC0;
  --text3:#5A6A8A;
  --text4:#2E3B55;
  --primary:#34D399;
  --primary-glow:rgba(52,211,153,.15);
  --accent:#6366F1;
  --accent2:#818CF8;
  --accent-glow:rgba(99,102,241,.12);
  --warn:#FBBF24;
  --danger:#F87171;
  --r:10px;
  --r-lg:14px;
  --ease:cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1);
  --dur:180ms;
  --sidebar-w:260px;
  --noise:url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 256 256' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='n'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='.85' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23n)' opacity='.02'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
}
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
html,body{height:100%;overflow:hidden;background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);font-family:'Inter',system-ui,sans-serif;font-size:14px;line-height:1.5;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased}
::selection{background:rgba(99,102,241,.25);color:#fff}

/* ═══ LAYOUT ═══ */
.app{display:flex;height:100dvh;position:relative}
.app::before{content:'';position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:0;pointer-events:none;
  background:radial-gradient(800px 600px at 5% 10%,rgba(99,102,241,.06) 0%,transparent 60%),radial-gradient(600px 600px at 95% 80%,rgba(139,92,246,.04) 0%,transparent 60%),radial-gradient(400px 400px at 40% 40%,rgba(52,211,153,.03) 0%,transparent 60%)}
.app::after{content:'';position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:0;pointer-events:none;background-image:var(--noise);background-repeat:repeat;opacity:.6}

/* ═══ SIDEBAR ═══ */
.sidebar{width:var(--sidebar-w);height:100%;display:flex;flex-direction:column;background:var(--bg2);border-right:1px solid var(--glass-border);z-index:5;position:relative;flex-shrink:0;transition:margin-left .25s var(--ease)}
.sidebar.collapsed{margin-left:calc(var(--sidebar-w) * -1)}

.sb-header{padding:14px 16px 10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--glass-border)}
.sb-logo{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--primary),var(--accent2));-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent}
.sb-tag{font-size:8px;color:var(--text4);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1.5px;margin-top:2px}
.sb-toggle{margin-left:auto;width:28px;height:28px;border:1px solid var(--glass-border);background:none;color:var(--text3);border-radius:var(--r);cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:12px;transition:all var(--dur)}
.sb-toggle:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);color:var(--text2)}

.sb-new{margin:10px 12px;padding:11px;border:1px dashed rgba(99,102,241,.2);border-radius:var(--r);background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(99,102,241,.04),rgba(52,211,153,.03));color:var(--accent2);font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;transition:all .2s var(--ease);text-align:center;letter-spacing:.3px}
.sb-new:hover{background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(99,102,241,.1),rgba(52,211,153,.06));border-color:rgba(99,102,241,.3);transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(99,102,241,.08)}

.sb-section{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1.2px;color:var(--text4);padding:12px 16px 4px}

.sb-sessions{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:4px 8px;scrollbar-width:thin;scrollbar-color:rgba(99,102,241,.1) transparent}
.sb-sessions::-webkit-scrollbar{width:4px}
.sb-sessions::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:rgba(99,102,241,.1);border-radius:999px}

.sb-sess{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px 10px;border-radius:var(--r);cursor:pointer;transition:all var(--dur);margin-bottom:2px;border:1px solid transparent}
.sb-sess:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.03)}
.sb-sess.active{background:rgba(99,102,241,.08);border-color:rgba(99,102,241,.12)}
.sb-sess-icon{font-size:14px;flex-shrink:0}
.sb-sess-info{flex:1;min-width:0}
.sb-sess-title{font-size:12px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
.sb-sess-meta{font-size:9px;color:var(--text4);margin-top:1px}
.sb-sess-del{opacity:0;width:20px;height:20px;border:none;background:none;color:var(--text4);cursor:pointer;border-radius:4px;font-size:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all var(--dur);flex-shrink:0}
.sb-sess:hover .sb-sess-del{opacity:1}
.sb-sess-del:hover{background:rgba(248,113,113,.1);color:var(--danger)}

/* Sidebar footer */
.sb-footer{padding:10px 12px;border-top:1px solid var(--glass-border);display:flex;gap:6px}
.sb-foot-btn{flex:1;padding:6px;border:1px solid var(--glass-border);background:none;color:var(--text3);border-radius:var(--r);cursor:pointer;font-size:10px;font-family:inherit;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:4px;transition:all var(--dur)}
.sb-foot-btn:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);color:var(--text2)}

/* ═══ MAIN AREA ═══ */
.main{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;position:relative;z-index:1;min-width:0}

/* Top bar */
.topbar{height:44px;display:flex;align-items:center;padding:0 16px;gap:10px;flex-shrink:0;background:rgba(10,14,28,.5);border-bottom:1px solid var(--glass-border);backdrop-filter:blur(16px)}
.tb-hamburger{width:30px;height:30px;border:none;background:none;color:var(--text3);cursor:pointer;font-size:16px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;border-radius:var(--r);transition:all var(--dur)}
.tb-hamburger:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);color:var(--text2)}
.tb-hamburger.hidden{display:none}
.tb-title{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);flex:1;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
.tb-pill{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:4px 12px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-radius:999px;font-size:10px;color:var(--text3)}
.tb-dot{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--danger);transition:background .4s;box-shadow:0 0 6px var(--danger)}
.tb-dot.ok{background:var(--primary);box-shadow:0 0 8px var(--primary-glow)}
.tb-dot.connecting{background:var(--warn);animation:pulse 1.2s infinite}
@keyframes pulse{50%{opacity:.3}}

/* Help button */
.tb-help{width:28px;height:28px;border:1px solid var(--glass-border);background:rgba(255,255,255,.02);color:var(--text3);border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;font-family:inherit;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all var(--dur)}
.tb-help:hover{background:rgba(99,102,241,.08);color:var(--accent2);border-color:rgba(99,102,241,.15)}

/* Help panel */
.help-panel{position:fixed;top:44px;right:0;width:min(380px,100vw);height:calc(100vh - 44px);background:rgba(10,14,28,.95);border-left:1px solid var(--glass-border);backdrop-filter:blur(24px);z-index:50;overflow-y:auto;padding:20px;transform:translateX(100%);transition:transform .25s var(--ease);scrollbar-width:thin;scrollbar-color:rgba(99,102,241,.1) transparent}
.help-panel.show{transform:translateX(0)}
.help-panel::-webkit-scrollbar{width:4px}
.help-panel::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:rgba(99,102,241,.12);border-radius:999px}
.help-title{font-size:16px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.help-section{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1.2px;color:var(--text4);margin:18px 0 8px;padding-bottom:4px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--glass-border)}
.help-card{padding:10px 12px;border-radius:var(--r);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);background:rgba(255,255,255,.015);margin-bottom:6px;transition:all var(--dur)}
.help-card:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.03)}
.help-card-head{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:4px}
.help-card-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;box-shadow:0 0 6px currentColor}
.help-card-name{font-size:13px;font-weight:600}
.help-card-role{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3)}
.help-card-desc{font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);line-height:1.5}
.help-feature{display:flex;gap:10px;padding:8px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.03)}
.help-feature:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.help-feature-icon{font-size:18px;flex-shrink:0;width:28px;text-align:center}
.help-feature-info{flex:1}
.help-feature-name{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:2px}
.help-feature-desc{font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);line-height:1.5}

/* ═══ CHAT AREA ═══ */
.chat-scroll{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:20px;padding-bottom:160px;scrollbar-width:thin;scrollbar-color:rgba(99,102,241,.08) transparent}
.chat-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar{width:5px}
.chat-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:rgba(99,102,241,.1);border-radius:999px}
.cards-area{max-width:780px;margin:0 auto;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px}

/* Council Visualizer */
.council-viz{max-width:780px;margin:0 auto 8px;padding:12px 0;position:sticky;top:0;z-index:10;backdrop-filter:blur(12px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(12px)}
.viz-strip{display:flex;gap:6px;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;padding:0 8px}
.viz-agent{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:4px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .3s var(--ease);padding:4px 6px;border-radius:10px;min-width:52px}
.viz-agent:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.03)}
.viz-agent.speaking{transform:scale(1.08)}
.viz-avatar{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;position:relative;transition:all .3s var(--ease);border:2px solid transparent}
.viz-avatar::after{content:'';position:absolute;inset:-4px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid transparent;transition:all .3s;animation:none}
.viz-agent.speaking .viz-avatar{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 16px rgba(52,211,153,.3)}
.viz-agent.speaking .viz-avatar::after{border-color:rgba(52,211,153,.3);animation:vizPulse 1.5s ease-in-out infinite}
.viz-agent.thinking .viz-avatar{border-color:rgba(245,158,11,.4);animation:vizBreathe 2s ease-in-out infinite}
.viz-name{font-size:8px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text3);text-align:center;max-width:52px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;transition:color .3s}
.viz-agent.speaking .viz-name{color:var(--accent)}
.viz-agent.thinking .viz-name{color:var(--warn)}
.viz-status{position:absolute;bottom:-1px;right:-1px;width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;border:1.5px solid var(--bg);background:var(--text3)}
.viz-agent.speaking .viz-status{background:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 6px rgba(52,211,153,.5)}
.viz-agent.thinking .viz-status{background:var(--warn)}
.viz-bubble{position:absolute;top:-24px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:rgba(14,18,36,.9);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-radius:6px;padding:2px 8px;font-size:8px;color:var(--text2);white-space:nowrap;pointer-events:none;opacity:0;transition:opacity .2s}
.viz-agent.speaking .viz-bubble,.viz-agent.thinking .viz-bubble{opacity:1}
@keyframes vizPulse{0%,100%{transform:scale(1);opacity:.6}50%{transform:scale(1.15);opacity:0}}

v2.0 · Multi-Agent Intelligence

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<link rel="manifest" href="/manifest.json"><meta name="theme-color" content="#060a14"><meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1">
<title>MAGI Monitor</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script src="https://unpkg.com/lucide@latest"></script>
<style>
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
:root{
  --bg:#060a14;--bg2:rgba(12,17,30,.92);--bg3:rgba(18,24,42,.88);
  --surface:rgba(255,255,255,.02);--glass:rgba(255,255,255,.04);--glass2:rgba(255,255,255,.06);
  --glass-border:rgba(255,255,255,.06);--glass-border2:rgba(255,255,255,.09);
  --text:#e8edf5;--text2:#8b95a8;--text3:#5a6478;
  --accent:#34d399;--accent2:#22d3ee;--primary:#818cf8;--primaryDim:rgba(129,140,248,.12);
  --warn:#fbbf24;--danger:#f87171;
  --r:12px;--ease:cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);
  --font:'Inter',system-ui,sans-serif;--mono:'JetBrains Mono',monospace
}
body{background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);font-family:var(--font);font-size:14px;min-height:100vh;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased}
::-webkit-scrollbar{width:5px}::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:transparent}::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);border-radius:9px}
body::before{content:'';position:fixed;width:500px;height:500px;border-radius:50%;filter:blur(100px);background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(129,140,248,.06),transparent 70%);top:-100px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);pointer-events:none;z-index:0}

.app{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;padding:20px;position:relative;z-index:1}

/* Nav */
.nav{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:6px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.nav a{color:var(--text3);font-size:11px;text-decoration:none;padding:4px 10px;border-radius:6px;transition:all .15s}
.nav a:hover{color:var(--text);background:var(--glass)}
.nav a.active{color:var(--accent);background:rgba(52,211,153,.08)}

/* Header */
.header{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;margin-bottom:20px}
.logo{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;text-decoration:none}
.logo span{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent}
.header h1{font-size:20px;font-weight:600;flex:1;letter-spacing:-.3px}
.header-actions{display:flex;gap:8px}
.btn-icon{padding:7px 14px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid var(--glass-border);background:var(--glass);color:var(--text2);cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;font-family:var(--font);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;transition:all .2s}
.btn-icon:hover{background:var(--glass2);color:var(--text)}

/* Summary */
.summary{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(150px,1fr));gap:10px;margin-bottom:20px}
.sum-card{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-radius:var(--r);padding:14px 16px;backdrop-filter:blur(12px)}
.sum-label{font-size:10px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.4px;color:var(--text3);margin-bottom:4px}
.sum-val{font-size:22px;font-weight:700;font-family:var(--mono);line-height:1.2}
.sum-sub{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:2px}

/* Routing bar */
.routing-bar{display:flex;gap:12px;margin-bottom:20px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.route-card{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-radius:var(--r);padding:14px 18px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;flex:1;min-width:240px;backdrop-filter:blur(12px)}
.route-icon{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.route-icon.wa{background:rgba(37,211,102,.12);color:#25D366}
.route-icon.tg{background:rgba(0,136,204,.12);color:#0088cc}
.route-label{font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;margin-bottom:2px}
.route-agent{font-size:13px;font-weight:600}
.route-select{margin-left:auto;padding:5px 10px;background:var(--glass);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-radius:6px;color:var(--text);font-size:11px;font-family:var(--font);cursor:pointer}
.route-select option{background:#1a1f30;color:var(--text)}
.route-select:focus{outline:none;border-color:var(--primary)}

/* Agent grid */
.agent-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(280px,1fr));gap:12px;margin-bottom:20px}
.agent-card{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-radius:var(--r);padding:18px;backdrop-filter:blur(12px);transition:all .25s var(--ease);position:relative;overflow:hidden;cursor:default}
.agent-card:hover{border-color:var(--glass-border2);transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.15)}

/* Agent header */
.ac-top{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:14px}
.ac-avatar{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;position:relative;flex-shrink:0;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.2)}
.ac-status-dot{position:absolute;bottom:-1px;right:-1px;width:11px;height:11px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid rgba(12,17,30,.92)}
.ac-status-dot.online{background:#34d399;box-shadow:0 0 6px rgba(52,211,153,.5)}
.ac-status-dot.idle{background:#fbbf24}
.ac-status-dot.offline{background:#5a6478}
.ac-info{flex:1;min-width:0}
.ac-name{font-size:14px;font-weight:600;line-height:1.2}
.ac-role{font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap}

/* Agent stats */
.ac-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:6px;margin-bottom:12px}
.ac-stat{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-radius:8px;padding:8px 10px}
.ac-stat-label{font-size:9px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.4px;color:var(--text3);margin-bottom:2px}
.ac-stat-value{font-size:14px;font-weight:600;font-family:var(--mono)}

/* Agent meta */
.ac-meta{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:4px}
.ac-tag{padding:3px 8px;border-radius:5px;font-size:10px;font-weight:500;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:3px}
.ac-tag i{width:10px;height:10px}
.ac-tag.model{background:rgba(129,140,248,.1);color:var(--primary);border:1px solid rgba(129,140,248,.15)}
.ac-tag.intensity{background:rgba(251,191,36,.08);color:var(--warn);border:1px solid rgba(251,191,36,.12)}
.ac-tag.channel{background:rgba(52,211,153,.08);color:var(--accent);border:1px solid rgba(52,211,153,.12)}
.ac-tag.layer{background:var(--glass);color:var(--text3);border:1px solid var(--glass-border)}

/* Activity log */
.log-section{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-radius:var(--r);padding:18px;backdrop-filter:blur(12px);margin-bottom:24px}
.log-section h3{font-size:14px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.log-section h3 i{width:16px;height:16px;color:var(--text3)}
.log-list{max-height:360px;overflow-y:auto}
.log-item{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:10px;padding:8px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.03);font-size:12px}
.log-item:last-child{border:none}
.log-time{color:var(--text3);font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;min-width:62px;flex-shrink:0}

content.text:
Everything is clean and complete. Here's a summary of what was built: --- ## Deliverables Complete ✅ ### 1. `/shared/core.css` — Unified Design System (179 lines) - CSS reset (`*, html, body`) - `@font-face` declarations for Inter 300-700 (self-hosted woff2) - All CSS variables in one `:root` block (backgrounds, glass, text, colors, radii, fonts, motion, noise, layout) - Ambient background orbs (`body::before` / `body::after`) - Scrollbar styling (webkit + firefox) - Selection color, focus-visible outline - Base animations: `fadeIn`, `slideUp`, `pulse`, `spin`, `shimmer` ### 2. `/shared/components.css` — Reusable Components (107 lines) - `.btn` variants: primary, danger, ghost, sm, lg, icon, disabled states - `.card`, `.card-header`, `.card-body` (glass-morphism) - `.input`, `.select`, `.textarea`, `.input-group` - `.badge` + success/warning/danger variants - `.modal-overlay`, `.modal`, `.modal-header`, `.modal-body`, `.modal-footer` - `.toast-container`, `.toast` with type variants + in/out animations - `.table`, `.table-row` - `.spinner` (CSS-only) with sm/lg sizes - `.empty-state` (icon + text + sub + action) - `.page-layout`, `.page-main`, `.page-content`, `.page-content-centered` - `.sidebar`, `.sidebar-item`, `.sidebar-item.active` - `.topbar` (sticky top with glass effect) - `.toggle` switch - Mobile responsive breakpoints ### 3. `/shared/core.js` — ES Module (155 lines) - `authGuard()` — validates `magi_token` via `/api/auth/me`, redirects to `/login/` - `api(path, options)` — fetch wrapper with auth header, JSON handling, 401 redirect, `{ data, error }` tuple - `toast(message, type, duration)` — injects toast container via JS, supports stacking, auto-dismiss - `escHtml()`, `timeAgo()`, `formatNumber()`, `debounce()`, `timeStr()` - `setLoading(element, loading)` — saves/restores innerHTML, shows spinner - `initPage(opts)` — runs authGuard, injects toast container, sets up global error handlers - `$()`, `$el()`, `$all()` — DOM helpers - `getToken()`, `getUser()` — localStorage accessors ### 4. `/shared/nav.js` — Global Navigation (281 lines) - `renderNav(activePage)` — renders collapsible sidebar nav - 4 groups: Core, Operations, Business, System (16 nav items) - Desktop: thin 56px icon sidebar, expands to 220px on hover with labels - Mobile: hidden by default, hamburger button triggers slide-out overlay - All CSS self-contained (injected via JS), no external dependencies - Injects into `
` or `document.body` ### 5. `/shared/ws-manager.js` — WebSocket Manager (228 lines) - `WSManager` class with connect/disconnect/send/on/off API - Exponential backoff reconnect (1s → 2s → 4s → ... → 30s max) with jitter - Max retry limit (default 20) with `max-retries` event - Client-side heartbeat ping every 30s - Connection state events: open, close, error, reconnecting, max-retries - Handles server `ping` → auto `pong` - Visual indicator: green (connected) / yellow (reconnecting) / red (offline) - Indicator CSS auto-injected ### 6. `/shared/markdown.js` — Safe Markdown Renderer (171 lines) - `renderMarkdown(text)` — returns sanitized HTML - `renderMarkdownInto(element, text)` — renders + adds copy buttons to code blocks - XSS sanitization: allowlist-based tag/attribute filtering, `javascript:` protocol blocking, forced `target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"` on links - Uses existing `/shared/marked.min.js` + `/shared/highlight.min.js` - Graceful fallback if libraries not loaded ### Bonus: `_test.html` — Integration test page Verifies all modules import correctly and components render properly. **No existing page files were modified.** All 6 files pass Node.js syntax validation.
